summary: ClashSolverFindCeilingVoidAtPointCommand — PDF FUNCTION "FIND_CEILING_VOID". Report ceiling height + structural obstruction height above a point, with void depth in mm.
usecase: Solver branch decision for "can I offset this service upward".
notfor: Actual movement — Offset*Up commands do that.
precondition: Active document; at least one non-template View3D; either (x,y,z) resolvers or a single-element selection.
postcondition: No model mutation — this is a read-only inspection recorded in CommandTracker.
logictree:
1) Resolve point: (Resolver_X, Resolver_Y, Resolver_Z) if provided; otherwise take top-centre of selected element's BB.
2) WireError if neither source yields a valid point.
3) Delegate to SpaceAnalysisFindCeilingVoidAbovePoint.GetAll(doc, x, y, z, max_distance_ft) — single source of truth.
4) Record ceiling_z, obstruction_z, void_height_mm, is_beam into tracker outputs.
5) Human path shows TaskDialog summary; Bot path emits only the JSON.
6) WireError on no-3d-view / no-hits; WireFault on exception.

thinkingsteps: Resolving point from resolvers or active selection…
successprompts: Void {void_height_mm} mm between ceiling {ceiling_z} ft and obstruction {obstruction_z} ft.
